rows.notes: P74 starts only after the landed P73 local hygiene/shrink inventory wave.
The review must cover the exact one-sided eleven-commit delta from p66 to p73.
The reviewed delta must stay inside docs/export/control/release surfaces.
The reviewed successor delta should expose exactly eleven commits before publication freeze.
The review happens before the live published branch is promoted away from p66 and while p73 remains the live local hygiene lane.
The review artifacts should be recorded from the dedicated p74 review branch.
